tasks.label: Build + flash M5
args: VERSION=$(cat VERSION) && NUMERIC=$(cat NUMERIC_VERSION) && NEW_NUMERIC=$((NUMERIC + 1)) && echo $NEW_NUMERIC > NUMERIC_VERSION && python3 pack.py flash "$VERSION" "$NEW_NUMERIC" && mpremote cp flash.json :/flash/apps/firmware_updater/update.json && mpremote exec "print(\"Importing firmware update...\"); exec(open(\"/flash/apps/firmware_updater/core.py\").read()); print(\"Installing firmware...\"); install_firmware(\"/flash/apps/firmware_updater/update.json\")"

tasks.label: Export binary
args: echo 'Please put device into bootloader mode.' && sleep 10 && esptool.py --chip esp32s3 --port /dev/tty.usbmodem14101 --baud 1500000 read_flash 0x0 0x800000 esp32fw.bin

tasks.label: Publish firmware
args: git add . && git commit -m "$(cat VERSION) (Build $(cat NUMERIC_VERSION))" && git push
